text: What's the weather like in Tokyo right now?
notes: 'Right now' clearly maps to get_current_weather; location provided

text: Give me the 7-day forecast for Miami
notes: Explicit forecast request with duration and city

text: What was the weather like in Paris on July 14th, 2023?
notes: Past date clearly requires get_historical_weather

text: Is it raining in London right now?
notes: Current conditions query; rain check maps to get_current_weather

text: Will it snow in Denver this weekend?
notes: Future event — weekend — requires get_forecast

text: What was the average temperature in Sydney in January 2022?
notes: Past month aggregation; get_historical_weather with date range

text: Tell me today's temperature and humidity in Singapore
notes: 'Today's' conditions map to get_current_weather

text: Get me next week's forecast for Chicago
notes: Future weekly forecast; get_forecast with 7-day window from next Monday

text: How hot was it in Phoenix during the summer of 2021?
notes: Historical range query; summer = June-August 2021

text: Current conditions in New York City, please
notes: Direct request for current conditions

text: What's the weather forecast for Barcelona for the next 5 days?
notes: Explicit 5-day forecast request

text: Was December 2022 unusually cold in Moscow?
notes: Requires historical data to compare against averages; get_historical_weather with analysis

text: What's the UV index in Melbourne today?
notes: UV index is a current condition metric; get_current_weather

text: Get the current weather in Amsterdam, then if it's raining, tell me the forecast for the next 3 days
notes: Conditional chain: get_current_weather first; get_forecast only if current conditions show rain

text: What was the weather like in Rome during the same week last year, and what's it forecast to be this week?
notes: Year-over-year comparison: get_historical_weather for same week last year, get_forecast for current week

text: Check today's weather in Dubai and give me a 10-day forecast so I can plan my trip
notes: Both current and forecast needed; sequential but could also be parallel

text: What's it like outside in Seattle right now, and what should I expect tomorrow?
notes: Current conditions + next-day forecast; logically sequential

text: Compare how cold it was in Toronto in February 2023 versus what the forecast is for this February
notes: Historical data vs forecast comparison for year-over-year analysis

text: Look at last summer's temperatures in Athens and predict if this year's summer will be hotter based on the forecast
notes: get_historical_weather for last summer; get_forecast for upcoming summer months

text: Tell me the current temperature in São Paulo, then show me what it was at this same time last year
notes: get_current_weather for now; get_historical_weather for exactly one year ago

text: Get the weather forecast for Vancouver this weekend and check how it compares to last weekend
notes: get_forecast for upcoming weekend; get_historical_weather for previous weekend

text: Is it currently raining in Portland? If not, give me this week's forecast
notes: Conditional chain based on current_weather result

text: What was last winter like in Helsinki, and is it expected to be similar this winter?
notes: Historical comparison with long-range forecast; winter = Dec-Feb period

text: Get today's weather in Mumbai and then pull the monsoon forecast for the next two weeks
notes: Sequential: current check then 14-day forecast

text: Check what the weather was in Oslo on my birthday last year, December 5th, and what it'll be this year
notes: Historical on Dec 5 last year; forecast for Dec 5 this year

text: What's the weather?
notes: No location provided; should ask for city/location. Default to current may be reasonable

text: Will the weather be good for my trip?
notes: Missing: destination, trip dates, and definition of 'good weather'. Needs clarification

text: Give me the forecast
notes: No location, no time range specified. Both are required

text: What was it like last summer?
notes: No location provided; 'last summer' is a vague date range without year/location context

text: Should I bring an umbrella?
notes: No location; could use GPS default but should ask. Also unclear if today or trip

text: How's the weather in that city I mentioned?
notes: Relies on conversational context not present; no city resolvable

text: Get me the weather report
notes: Ambiguous between current and forecast; no location given

text: Is it a good time to visit?
notes: Missing: destination, planned dates, and visitor's preferences

text: What's the weather going to be like?
notes: No location, no date range. Should ask for both before calling get_forecast

text: Check the historical weather data
notes: No location, no date specified. Extremely underspecified

text: Is it cold there?
notes: 'There' has no resolvable referent; needs location clarification

text: What's the weather this weekend?
notes: Time frame provided (weekend) but location is missing

text: Tell me about the weather conditions
notes: No location, no time specified. 'Conditions' suggests current but needs location

text: Get the current weather in London and Paris simultaneously
notes: Two parallel get_current_weather calls for different cities

text: I need the current conditions in New York and the 5-day forecast at the same time
notes: Both current and forecast for same city; independent calls can run in parallel

text: Check the weather forecast for Berlin, Vienna, and Prague for next week
notes: Three parallel get_forecast calls for three European cities

text: Give me today's weather in San Francisco, LA, and Seattle simultaneously
notes: Three parallel current weather calls for US West Coast cities

text: Compare current weather in Mumbai and Delhi
notes: Two parallel get_current_weather calls; results compared afterward

text: Get me this week's forecast and last week's weather history for the same city — Cape Town
notes: Parallel: forecast for upcoming week and historical for last week

text: Pull forecasts for all five cities on my travel itinerary: Tokyo, Seoul, Bangkok, Singapore, and Bali
notes: Five parallel get_forecast calls for a multi-city trip

text: What's the current weather in both my origin city and destination — Chicago and Miami?
notes: Two parallel current weather calls for departure and destination

text: Get the historical weather for last Christmas and the forecast for this Christmas in Edinburgh
notes: Parallel historical and forecast calls for same location/season different years

text: Check current conditions in three major ski resorts: Zermatt, Aspen, and Niseko
notes: Three parallel get_current_weather calls for ski resort locations

text: Give me both the current weather and the 7-day forecast for Reykjavik so I can plan my Northern Lights trip
notes: Parallel current and forecast calls for same city

text: Compare the weather forecasts for Cancún and Phuket for next month so I can decide where to vacation
notes: Two parallel get_forecast calls; results compared for destination decision
